subcodes.first_line: O true servant of God, thy letter was considered and its contents were noted. Praise be unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حقیقی الهی مکتوب ملاحظه گردید و از مضمون اطلاع حاصل گردید حمد خدا را
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @eulogies; reminiscences
